text:
It was an odd sight. A cat wearing a tiny graduation cap meowed enthusiastically as it clambered up a tree.

Farmer Linda hadn't seen Prickly Patty like this in years. Normally nocturnal, Patty somehow caught a mouse at daybreak, got some unusual praise from Linda, and vanished into her hat again. Today, the hat was empty.

"What are you doing?" Linda asked.

"Pretendo-graduating," Patty answered with a purr.

"That's quite the cap," Linda smiled.

"I'm going to be...a nocturnal owl?"

"That’d make sense."

"Oh! Would I ever. First step: getting a proper owl hat."

Linda laughed. "Where on earth do you get hats?"

"At the costume shop downtown. It’s their specialty."

"A nocturnal owl?"

"Nah, that’s something you’d see in a fantasy book. I make hats."

"So you got owl ears?"

"Can't yet. Just some little bumps."
